question.text: Can the pledgor set up a pledge request with a future execution date?

answer.text: Yes, the pledgor has the facility to set up pledge with a future execution date
No, pledge can only be created on the same business day
Yes, but only up to 7 days in the future
No, only the pledgee can request future-dated pledges

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Pledgor BO shall have the facility to set up pledge request with future date as execution date. **The Trap:** Option (c) adds a time limit that doesn't exist in the regulations. **Cross-Exam Context:** Future-dated instructions are also allowed in settlement operations covered in NISM Series VI. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Future-dated pledge requests help synchronize pledge creation with loan disbursement dates.
